paths.title: New Catholic
paths.description: Core doctrines every Catholic should know — from the Trinity to the Eucharist.
paths.audience: New Catholics, RCIA candidates, and curious seekers exploring the faith.

paths.title: Defend the Faith
paths.description: Apologetics essentials for answering the most common objections to Catholicism.
paths.audience: Catholics who encounter objections from Protestants or secular friends.

paths.title: Marian Apologetics
paths.description: Understanding and defending the Catholic Church's doctrines about Mary.
paths.audience: Catholics who want to defend Marian doctrines with Scripture and Tradition.

paths.title: Basic Apologetics Course
paths.description: The complete 20-topic Layman's Biblical Theology and Apologetics Course — read every lesson, then take tiered quizzes to earn a certificate.
paths.audience: Lay Catholics completing the full guided course, in English, Tagalog, or Cebuano.
